---
description: 'review a feature implementation against FEATURE.md and slice docs'
---

# Rules
- Do NOT write implementation code
- Do NOT refactor unless critical
- Only comment on:
  - Missing acceptance criteria
  - Edge cases
  - Inconsistencies
  - Test gaps
  - Risky assumptions

# Context
- FEATURE.md defines scope
- Slices define expected behavior

# Task
- Review the implementation against FEATURE.md and slices.
- Return a checklist of issues.
